userText: Good adverising can help the company to sell its products
correctedText: Good advertising can help the company sell its products.
generalAdvice: 这句整体已经自然。下一步主要是稳住 advertising 的拼写，并熟悉 help + object + base verb 这个结构。

issues.note: adverising 拼写错误，应为 advertising。
issues.suggestion: 把 advertising 和 advertise 放在一起记，注意中间是 -tis-。

issues.note: help the company to sell 没错，但在日常表达里更常见的是 help the company sell。
issues.suggestion: 优先熟悉 help + 人/事物 + 动词原形，比如 help customers save time。
